name: Grace Wine Holdings Limited
summary: Grace Wine Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the production and distribution of wine products under the Grace Vineyard brand name in the People's Republic of China. The company offers red, white, and sparkling types of wine. It also plants vine and sells wine grapes. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong. Grace Wine Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Macmillan Equity Limited.
